title: ARGYLE GARDENS - 211info
text: TRANSITION PROJECTS ARGYLE GARDENS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers 72 affordable housing units. 650 NW Irving Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Low income individuals Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 280-4700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 280-4700 Main phone Main phone (503) 280-4700 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: Income restrictions apply. Contact property manager for details. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Two blocks northwest of Union Station. On theTriMet MAX Yellow and Green lines. Services: Homeless Permanent Supportive Housing Single Room Occupancy Housing Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - IDENTIFICATION ASSISTANCE GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - MEDICAL CLINIC HOUSING/SHELTER - BARBARA MAHER APARTMENTS HOUSING/SHELTER - CLARK CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - DOREEN'S PLACE HOUSING/SHELTER - JEAN'S PLACE HOUSING/SHELTER - RESOURCE CENTER TRANSPORTATION - TRIMET TICKETS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
